channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [Transformer] vit-pytorch
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
Implementation of Vision Transformer, a simple way to achieve SOTA in vision classification with only a single transformer encoder, in Pytorch
Language: Python
Category: Transformer Stars: 24,984 | Forks: 3,478

item.title: [Transformer] sglang
item.description:
📈 Rank: #10 → #9 (↑1)
SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
Language: Python
Category: Transformer Stars: 25,016 | Forks: 5,006

item.title: [OpenAI] vllm
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10 in OpenAI
A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs
Language: Python
Category: OpenAI Stars: 74,345 | Forks: 14,784

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 105,452 → 108,508 (+3,056)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: LLM Stars: 108,508 | Forks: 14,160

item.title: [Deepseek] lobehub
item.description:
📉 Rank: #6 → #7 (↓1)
The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.
Language: TypeScript
Category: Deepseek Stars: 74,324 | Forks: 14,838

item.description:

item.title: [Claude] gstack
